summary: Returns a promise that resolves with the underlying binary buffer of a bundled WebAssembly file or rejects if the file cannot be read.
signature_intent: A zero-argument asynchronous helper for loading a local WebAssembly binary into memory.
behavior: Reads a fixed WebAssembly file located alongside the executing module.
Resolves with the file data's underlying ArrayBuffer when reading succeeds.
Rejects with the read error when reading fails.
edge_cases: Rejects if the file is missing or inaccessible.
Rejects if filesystem reading reports any error.
The resolved buffer may reference the full backing buffer of the file data.
